title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 23 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 23 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 23 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/07/2024
DCE iron ore futures market falling sharply trends by 3.43%. some traders do not sell,Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high. PBF at Shandong port dealt 775-790 yuan/mt; decreased 20-30 yuan/mt over yesterday.
